title: Currency and Treasury Act
summary: Establishes the Astorian Crown (AC/ASC) as the national currency, defines the authority of the Ministry of the Treasury, creates the public treasury ledger, and establishes the national budget framework.

title: Executive Ministries Act
summary: Establishes the Executive Ministries of the Principality, defines their authority and duties, and provides for the orderly administration of the Government.

title: Citizenship Act
summary: Establishes law governing citizenship of the Principality, defines the rights, privileges, and obligations of citizens, and provides for the granting and revocation of citizenship.

title: Civil Service Act
summary: Establishes the Civil Service, defines its administration, eligibility, and duties, and provides for the orderly employment of government personnel.

title: Criminal Code Act
summary: Defines criminal offenses within the Principality, establishes standards of liability and punishment, and provides for the protection of the State, its citizens, and its institutions.
